disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began two to three days after starting induction chemotherapy for a large lymphoma
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any treatment or medication changes recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I only started chemo for my lymphoma three days ago. I felt drained the next day and today everything hit at once.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No urine passed for approximately 12 hours
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't passed any urine since this morning — nothing for about 12 hours, even though I feel like I should.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Both hands locked in painful cramp/spasm; unable to uncurl fingers
trigger_question_examples: Which parts of your body are cramping?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hands have seized up into a claw and I physically can't straighten my fingers — it's agony.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent forceful vomiting; has vomited the last two doses of the kidney-protection tablet
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to keep your medications down?
How much vomiting are you having?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been vomiting non-stop and I've thrown up the last two of the kidney tablets they gave me — nothing stays down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling muddled and profoundly lethargic; unclear on the timeline of events
trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling confused or unusually drowsy?
Do you know roughly when each symptom started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really foggy and exhausted — I'm not even sure exactly when each thing started, it's all a blur.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dull ache in both sides of the lower back/flanks
trigger_question_examples: Any pain in your back or sides?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache in both sides of my lower back at the same time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is alone and physically unable to grip a phone or drink water
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to look after yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely on my own and I can barely hold the phone because my hands are cramped — I can't even drink water.
